Recovery 81 • Sleep 65 • Strain 5%

Read
Recovery is quietly supportive, and output has run much lighter than your usual day, leaving the system fresh rather than taxed. The midday meal steadied energy, but protein still trails the evening window, so today favors measured strength work and muscle preservation over chasing volume.

Quiet momentum.
